lastReleaseMessage: Security + dependency remediation (bar-raise 2026-07-01). Rotated the exposed Discord announcements webhook (old deleted, leaked 5b3d7cc URL now 404, replacement wired + tested). Cleared all high+ dependency advisories: vitest 1.6->3.2.6 (CRITICAL Vitest-UI file-read), vite 5->6.4.3 via override (HIGH server.fs.deny bypass), form-data>=4.0.6 override (HIGH CRLF injection), hono->4.12.27. pnpm audit clean at high+; preship green on vite 6 + vitest 3 (153 API + 20 web tests). Added the Plaid-relay privacy disclosure on the YaE budget privacy page. All twelve 2026-07-01 bar-raise actions now closed; verdict healthy.

barRaise.topFinding: Yesterday's deep pass flagged two HIGH and seven MEDIUM findings; v0.14.2 and v0.14.3 closed all twelve, and this run confirms the fixes hold. The delta since is narrow and verified: eight Dependabot merges landed on main after v0.14.3, three of them majors (vite 6.4.3 to 8.1.2, typescript 5.9.3 to 6.0.3, plugin-react 4 to 6), and the full suite is green on the upgraded toolchain (153 API + 20 web tests), build is clean, and audit reports only one moderate at high+. The one live gap is drift, not breakage: those major bumps sit unreleased and an uncommitted DESIGN.md D-007 doc-sync sits in the tree, so the version pills still read 0.14.3 while main no longer matches. All four hard-rule checks pass live, so there is no BLOCK and the verdict moves needs-attention to working.

actions.title: Commit the pending DESIGN.md D-007 doc-sync and cut a v0.14.4 patch release to capture the merged vite 8 / typescript 6 / plugin-react 6 bumps and drop the now-no-op root vite override.
